label: DC2
evidence: Reynolds et al. (2021) explicitly name: 'Dendritic Cells 1 and 2 (DC1, DC2)'. DC2 corresponds to the classical type 2 dendritic cell (cDC2) subset characterised by CD1c (BDCA-1), CLEC10A, and CD11b expression. Reynolds et al. note: 'enrichment of gene signatures for murine dermal CD11c+ (DC2)' in the figure legend. Note: DC2_fetal.md already exists; this report is for the adult DC2 population only.
